content.en:
Soon, this time the first points were announced.

First place: Xuanqin Daozu, points: 5980

Seeing this first place, Ye Tian was shocked.

"I went, and I actually scored 5980 points, so I'm sure there is no cheating?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He has the help of copying talent, which is almost open cheating, and he only won 3890 points!

I didn't expect this Xuanqin Dao Ancestor to have so many points higher than him!

"Sure enough, it's the first Xuanqin Dao Ancestor!"

The Immortal Blood Dao Ancestor was not surprised in the slightest.

Ye Tian looked at the Underworld Blood Dao Ancestor and asked curiously, "Underworld Blood Dao Ancestor, do you know this Xuanqin Dao Ancestor?"

The Immortal Blood Dao Ancestor shook his head, "I just know about her, I haven't seen her. But this Xuanqin Dao Ancestor is very famous, if you have joined the Endless Dao Ancestor for a long time, you will naturally know her existence. Xuanqin Dao Ancestor is not only the heir of a Ninefold Ancestor, but more importantly, her comprehension and qualifications are very powerful, and now not only has her life level reached above 9, but she also has a very special Dao body, which makes her strength far surpass that of other half-step Sevenfold Ancestors in the Nine-Fold Building, and is known as the invincible existence of this generation of Half-Step Sevenfold Ancestors!"

Heir of the Ninefold Ancestor!

Ye Tian was completely convinced, with such a background, how terrifying the other party's own life-saving ability was, plus the life level reached more than 9, his strength was naturally extremely strong, and it was not a strange thing to surpass him.

"Immortal Blood Dao Ancestor, since this Xuanqin Dao Ancestor has already raised his life level above 9, why doesn't he go to the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm?" Ye Tian said with some curiosity.

"If the life level reaches 9 or above, it is possible to condense the ninefold life Dao flower, but it does not mean that reaching the life level of 9 is the ultimate of the half-step sevenfold ancestor, and the real ultimate is the 9.9 life level. I guess Xuanqin Daozu wants to hit the 9.9 life level. However, she should have participated in this competition just for fun, and she was not really interested in the true blood of the Black Abyss Giant Beast, this kind of true blood should be of little use to her!"

"Life level 9.9!"

Ye Tian really didn't know much about this, after all, when he reached life level 9, he could condense the ninefold life Dao flower.

But now it seems that there should be other benefits to reaching the life level of 9.9, otherwise that Xuanqin Dao Ancestor would not try to raise the life level to 9.9!

From 9 to 9.9, the difficulty is much more difficult than going from life level 8 to life level 9!

Ye Tian estimated that most of the half-step sevenfold ancestors who had reached life level 9 gave up continuing to improve, and instead chose to impact the realm of sevenfold ancestors.

Soon.

The second place in the points this time was also announced, and it was not Ye Tian, which made Ye Tian a little disappointed.

Second place: Jin Xuan Daozu, 4200 points

Through the introduction of the Immortal Blood Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian also knew the identity of the Jin Xuan Dao Ancestor, a descendant of a Ninefold Ancestor, not an heir, but his life level had also reached 9, and his reputation in the Nine-Story Building was also very great.

Then, the third place was announced.

Third place: Endless Dao Ancestor, points: 3890

Seeing this name, Ye Tian was very indifferent, without the slightest excitement, after all, he didn't even win the first place!

But the Immortal Blood Dao Ancestor was dumbfounded!

What is the concept of third place, he knows very well that among Ye Tian's competitors, there are many half-step sevenfold ancestors who have reached the life level of 9, and there are also a group of descendants of the ninefold origin ancestors and eightfold ancestors.

There are quite a few half-step sevenfold ancestors who participated in the mission of the Nine-Folded Building this time, and it stands to reason that those half-step sevenfold ancestors of the Yellow Building have no hope of winning the top thirty-six at all.

Those who had the hope of obtaining thirty-six places were the half-step sevenfold ancestors of those ground buildings.

The half-step sevenfold ancestors of the ground floor are almost all geniuses who have reached a life level of 8.5 or above, and have the recommendation of the half-step ninefold ancestor.

Compared with them, what advantages does Ye Tian, a newcomer who has only recently joined the Nine-Story Building and has no background, have?

Unexpectedly, under such circumstances, Ye Tian would win the third place.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, you really impress us!"

The Immortal Blood Dao Ancestor sighed.

He knew very well that from now on, Ye Tian's future was afraid to surpass him, and maybe it wouldn't be long before he could become an official member of Xuanlou.

In short, Ye Tian's potential is far beyond ah!

"Maybe the Endless Dao Ancestor has the hope of condensing the Ninefold Life Dao Flower!"

The Immortal Blood Dao Ancestor secretly said.

And he only condensed the sevenfold life Dao flower at the beginning, and there was no hope of becoming a ninefold ancestor in the future, and the limit of his life was just a half-step ninefold ancestor.

But in fact, the Dao Ancestor who only condensed the Sevenfold Life Dao Flower had no hope of becoming a half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor, and the probability was too low.

......

Soon, the name of the Endless Dao Ancestor was known to many Dao Ancestors of the Nine-Story Building, especially the one who knew that Ye Tian was only one of the members of the Yellow Building, and he was even more shocked.

It didn't take long for the thirty-six members to be announced, and Ye Tian was the only member of the Yellow Building, the others were basically members of the Earth Building, and there was also one member of the Xuanlou.

However, due to the regulations, Ye Tian's life level did not reach above 8, so there was no way to apply to join the Xuanlou.

But.

Many of the owners of the Xuanlou have already contacted Ye Tian, just wait for Ye Tian's life level to be raised to more than 8, and they can join their Xuanlou, and the assessment task will be given a simple task casually, which can be easily completed.

The reason why these Xuanlou want to win over Ye Tian is also for internal assessment, the Xuanlou is strong, there are many resources, and if you cultivate a member of the Dilou, there will also be a reward.

It's like the Hanhai Yellow Building, this time a Ye Tian was born, and the next resource reward will be very rich.

The four official members of the Hanhai Yellow House will all receive a lot of benefits.

......

Hanhai Yellow Building.

Ye Tian silently waited for the reward of the Black Abyss Giant Beast's true blood, he had already spent 1,000 points to buy the Black Abyss Giant Beast's true blood, just waiting for the true blood to arrive.

Airplanes!!!

An eightfold ancestor of the Nine-Story Building personally sent the true blood of the Black Abyss Giant Beast, and this true blood was blocked by a force, and no breath leaked out.

After the things were delivered, the Yae Ancestor left.

"This is the true blood of the Black Abyss Giant Beast, I don't know how much life level it can be raised?"

Ye Tian was looking forward to it.

Immediately, he began to retreat, using life drain to absorb the energy of the true blood of the Black Abyss Behemoth, which should maximize the use of energy.

Rumble!!!!

The energy of the Black Abyss Giant Beast's true blood was continuously absorbed by Ye Tian, rapidly increasing his life level.

"What a powerful effect!!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's life level continued to improve, and at a certain moment, it seemed that a boundary had been crossed.

"It should have broken the 8 life level!"

Ye Tian guessed.

He didn't test the life level, but continued to absorb energy to improve the life level until he completely exhausted the energy of the Black Abyss Behemoth's true blood.
